summary: Altera Digital Health, Inc. provides feedback on the HTI-5 proposed rule based on over three decades of experience delivering clinical and interoperability solutions to a wide range of healthcare providers. They emphasize their informed perspective on the deregulatory actions proposed by ASTP/ONC.
key_arguments: Experience with diverse care settings informs their feedback
The importance of interoperability and clinical/business solutions
The need to balance deregulatory actions with maintaining effective health IT functionality
notable_quote: We can submit informed feedback today on this important topic.
